description: Style Notefrench connection's Spring Summer bag collection indulges in a delicious crystal and sequin fest, perfectly capturing the season's vibrancy. Maximize the impact of this piece with a monochrome dress and don't forget to accessorize tonally! Product DetailsBlack and gold clutch with one main compartment that has an inner zipped pocket and a magnetic buttoned closureShaped like a japanese fan and has beads and sequins detaillingMaterial and CareBlended fabricWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 20 cmWidth: 28 cm
